label: 第83話
source_locator: 単行本10巻 目次 p.67
summary_short: 渋谷一帯に一般人を閉じ込める帳が下ろされ、人々は五条悟を連れてくるよう要求する。術師たちが帳の外で待機する中、五条は単独で地下へ入る。
summary_full: 10月31日、渋谷駅を中心とする広範囲に、一般人だけを閉じ込める帳が下ろされる。通信は遮断され、帳の内側へ入ることはできても一般人は外へ出られず、群衆は一斉に「五条悟を連れて来い」と要求する。高専は五条単独での事態収拾を決め、七海班、禪院班、日下部班、冥冥班を各所へ待機させる。五条は渋谷ヒカリエから地下へ入り、副都心線ホームで漏瑚・花御・脹相と対峙。敵は一般人を盾として、最強の術師を獄門疆の条件へ追い込もうとする。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: The 渋谷事変 begins! A massive curtain imbued with special conditions is trapping civilians in 渋谷 and each one of them has been told to beg for the same thing: "bring 五条悟 ". While four teams of jujutsu sorcerers wait outside the perimeter, the 呪霊 waiting underground for 五条 are ready to spring their trap.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: The record of the 渋谷事変 begins at 7:00 pm when a curtain is cast with a four-hundred-meter radius in the middle of 渋谷 City. Non-sorcerers can enter the curtain but they can't exit, trapping them inside. Jujutsu sorcerers and managers can move through it as they please but the reception is blocked so all communication has to be maintained outside the curtain. Non-sorcerers trapped in the curtain asking for 五条悟. 伊地知潔高 informs the 七海 Team of the situation outside the curtain in the 東京 Metro , 渋谷駅 . It consists of 七海 , 恵 , and 猪野琢真 . 七海 expresses the situation is quite a pain while 猪野 tries to inform 恵 more about the curtain. Conditions added to curtains generally revolve around curses, therefore reception being blocked is a secondary effect. 恵 already knows this, so 七海 tells 猪野 to stop showing off just because he's older. 猪野 takes exception to that comment but 七海 ignores him and asks 伊地知 where 五条 is. Meanwhile, just outside the 渋谷 Mark City business center, there is nobody outside the normally busy intersection in front of the station. Something terrible happened and everyone spread out near the perimeter of the curtain. They're all asking for the same thing, "bring 五条悟". 新田明 relays this information to the 禪院 Team consisting of 野薔薇 , 真希 , and the head of the 禪院家 , 禪院直毘人 . 五条悟 arrives! 直毘人 understands that the non-sorcerers were told to say it. Sorcerers are free to move in and out of the curtain, so that makes it impossible for them to break the barrier with brute force. The ideal strategy is to look for and neutralize the 呪詛師 who cast the curtain. However, each team is on standby for now because the higher-ups decided 五条 should work alone to suppress the 渋谷事変 as quickly as possible. The 日下部 Team consists of only パンダ and the second-year teacher himself, 日下部篤也 . He tells パンダ that 冥冥 has a squad as well as they wait outside Jr 渋谷駅 . All the squads' assignments are to secure the perimeter of the curtain and take care of anything that might slip past 五条. パンダ understands not wanting any unnecessary jujutsu sorcerers injured while they can't communicate inside the curtain anyway. As for the civilians, 日下部 insists that inside the curtain is relatively peaceful. Civilians are panicked but there isn't anyone or anything going around killing them. With that being the case, 日下部 still wouldn't go back inside because there are a bunch of special grade curses inside the 渋谷 渋谷ヒカリエ . 五条悟 welcomes the challenge of suppressing the incident alone. 内部 the curtain, the civilians dressed in their Halloween costumes all discuss the situation. They want 五条 to hurry and show so they can leave and people are losing their patience. Two girls compare it to a horror movie where they're all trapped. Another guy tells them about the incident where everyone got sucked into the station while waiting at the intersection outside 渋谷 Mark City, just as 明 had mentioned earlier. At 8:31 pm, 五条悟 arrives inside the curtain and makes his way inside 渋谷ヒカリエ ShinQs 渋谷 shopping mall, hundreds of Halloween-dressing civilians are huddled closely together inside. 悟 analyzes the situation and heads straight down to the BF5, the lowest level basement where the subway operates. He figures he has an idea of the enemy's plan and invites them to try their best. 漏瑚, 花御, and 脹相 confront the strongest sorcerer. At Aoyama Cemetery, the 冥冥 Team awaits further instructions. 悠仁 is eager to help and 冥冥 surmises they'll be called in as back up shortly. 憂憂 , 冥冥's younger brother feels that she shouldn't be used in such a way. They get a message that another curtain has appeared to coincide with 五条's arrival. 冥冥's team runs towards the Meiji-Jingu-Mae Station and 悠仁 assures 冥冥 he can keep up. 悟 descends into the 東京 Metro BF5 on the Fukutoshin ホーム where he's confronted by 漏瑚 , 花御 , and 脹相 . 悟 tells 漏瑚 not to have an excuse this time and 漏瑚 replies that the strongest sorcerer should have his first-ever excuse ready.

key_events_verified_phase5: 一般人だけを閉じ込める帳が渋谷へ下ろされる
高専の各班が外周待機する
五条が単独で渋谷駅地下へ入る
verification_notes_phase5: 集英社公式10・11巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第五段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
